response_schema: ExtractionResponse has metadata: MetadataSchema and chunks: list[ChunkSchema] — 1-to-1 mirror of domain models
Add processing_time_ms at top level of ExtractionResponse
error_mapping: UnsupportedFormatError -> 415, ExtractionTimeoutError -> 504, ExtractionError/FilterError/ChunkingError/EnrichmentError -> 422, validation errors -> 413/415/422 as appropriate
Error response body: {error_code: str, message: str} — no cause/stack trace exposed
Validation errors (pre-domain) use same {error_code, message} shape with VAL-* codes (VAL-001 size, VAL-002 MIME, VAL-003 magic bytes)

questions.question: How should ExtractionResponse nest DocumentMetadata and DocumentChunk?
Should ExtractionResponse include a top-level status or processing_time_ms field?
How should HealthResponse look for GET /health?
Where should Pydantic response schemas live?
How should SelectionMaid domain errors map to HTTP status codes?
What should error response bodies look like?
How should validation errors from file checks be structured?
questions.selected: Same {error_code, message} shape with VAL-* codes
